name: maxEventsBudgetExhausted
description: With maxEvents = 1, the shot is truncated right after its first cushion: the solver closes the polyline with a rest event at the bounce point and adds no further segments.
derivation: First cushion at x = 1.241425 (event #1). Post-bounce speed 0.75*sqrt(9 - 1.241425) ~= 2.089 m/s is well above rest,
but the budget is exhausted, so the prediction ends with rest at the cushion point.
Expected: one roll segment, then [cushion, rest] both at (1.241425, 0).
